emocio.desired_transformation: animal and observer on stable ground with open space
emocio.uncertainty: Izenačena najvišja vrednotenja: rescue_direct_entry, rescue_distance_tool, rescue_wait_help.

instinkt.uncertainty: protective cost tie within configured epsilon

causal_sequence: The animal is located six metres below on a ledge.
Directly entering the slope poses physical danger due to falling fragments.
A ten-metre rope exceeds the distance to the animal while allowing the observer to stay on a stable platform.
Waiting for help introduces a seven-minute delay during which slope stability is uncertain.
racio.explicit_goal: Rescue the animal while minimizing physical danger to the observer.
facts_used: The animal is visible on a ledge about six metres below the observer.
Small fragments fall from the slope when rocks shift, creating physical danger.
A ten-metre rope and loop are available for use from a stable platform.
Trained help reported an arrival time of about seven minutes.
racio.main_objection: Direct entry is too dangerous due to crumbling rocks, and waiting may be too slow if the slope fails further.
racio.uncertainty: The stability of the slope over the next seven minutes remains an unknown variable.
unknowns: Whether the slope will remain stable for the next seven minutes is unknown.
Whether the animal is injured is unknown.
utility_structure: Direct entry: High risk of injury to observer.
Distance tool: Low risk to observer, immediate attempt at rescue.
Wait for help: Moderate risk due to time delay and slope instability.

conclusion.desired_transformation: animal and observer on stable ground with open space
conclusion.uncertainty: Izenačena najvišja vrednotenja: rescue_direct_entry, rescue_distance_tool, rescue_wait_help.
